title: Ariel Pilismarót Guesthouse
subtitle: Multilingual showcase website for a Danube Bend guesthouse
description: A trilingual (HU/EN/DE) showcase website with direct-booking-optimized UX for a guesthouse in the Danube Bend, Hungary.

content.overview: Ariel Pilismarót Guesthouse is a trilingual (Hungarian/English/German) showcase website for an accommodation in the Danube Bend region of Hungary. The site's primary goal is to maximize direct bookings — phone calls and email serve as the main conversion channels, bypassing intermediary platforms like Booking.com.
content.challenge: The guesthouse needed a fast, mobile-friendly website that presents the property and its surroundings in three languages, while encouraging visitors to book directly via phone or email — eliminating intermediary commission fees.
content.solution: Built with Astro's static site generator, the website ships zero JavaScript to the client by default, ensuring lightning-fast load times. Tailwind CSS provides responsive design, and Cloudflare Pages delivers global CDN and reliable hosting — all cost-effectively.

features.title: Trilingual support (HU/EN/DE)
features.description: Full Hungarian, English, and German content with locale-based routing to serve international guests

features.title: Direct-booking-optimized UX
features.description: Phone calls and email as primary conversion channels, bypassing intermediary booking platforms

features.title: Gallery with filters
features.description: Photo gallery with interior, exterior, and surroundings categories for visual property showcase

features.title: Area guide & restaurant recommendations
features.description: Dedicated sections showcasing Danube Bend attractions and local restaurant recommendations

features.title: SEO-optimized
features.description: Structured meta tags, sitemap, and Open Graph integration for search engine visibility
